MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-22-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS JONATHON MARTINSEN, JOHN BOGARIN AND COMPASS GROUP USA, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION FROM SEPTEMBER 22, 2016 TO OCTOBER 3, 2016 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE THE PARTIES AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH THE REQUIREMENT IN THE LOCAL RULES TO SUBMIT COURTESY COPIES OF ALL PAPERS FILED ON THE MOTION AND THE COMPLAINT THAT IS THE SUBJECT OF THE MOTION. COURTESY COPIES NEED TO BE RECEIVED BY DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 27, 2016 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE DATE OF THE CONTINUED HEARING. PLAINTIFF IS DIRECTED TO DELIVER A COURTESY COPY OF HIS MOVING PAPERS DIRECTLY TO DEPARTMENT 302. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: SHERRY L. SAWYER, CSR #5976, EMAIL: SSAWYER@SFTC.ORG. (D302)
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-03-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS JONATHON MARTINSEN, JOHN BOGARIN AND COMPASS GROUP USA, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS MAINTAIN THEIR INITIAL SUMMARY JUDGMENT BURDEN AND PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PRESENT ANY ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE CREATING A TRIABLE ISSUE. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CCP SECTION 437C(G). JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: SHERRY L. SAWYER, CSR NO. 5976, EMAIL: SSAWYER@SFTC.ORG. (D302)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Motion For Summary Judgment Or Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Phillip Prater (925-479-1817) appears as plaintiff/opposing party

Lonnie D. Giamela of Fisher & Phillips LLP (213-330_4500) appears telephonically as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS JONATHON MARTINSEN, JOHN BOGARIN AND COMPASS GROUP USA, INC.'S Motion For Summary Judgment Or Summary Adjudication is GRANTED. Defendants maintain their initial summary judgment burden and plaintiff fails to present any admissible evidence creating a triable issue. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CCP Section 437c(g).

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Motion For Summary Judgment Or Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Sep-23-2016 Continued To Oct-03-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Phillip Prater (925-439-1517) appears as plaintiff/opposing party, In Propria Persona

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS JONATHON MARTINSEN, JOHN BOGARIN AND COMPASS GROUP USA, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summary Adjudication is Continued on the court's own motion to October 3, 2016 to give the parties an opportunity to comply with the requirement in the local rules to submit courtesy copies of all papers filed on the motion and the complaint that is the subject of the motion. Courtesy copies need to be received by department 302 no later than September 27, 2016 with a cover letter stating the date of the continued hearing. Plaintiff is directed to deliver a courtesy copy of his moving papers directly to Department 302.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
